description.value: This spell induces a hallucinogenic reality in the mind of your target. Surfaces seem to swim, and movement constantly distracts the eye. The target takes a â2 penalty on Will saving throws, caster level checks, Intelligence -based skill checks, and Wisdom -based skill checks.
